summary: Markets remain bifurcated between risk assets and safe havens amid US-Iran Hormuz tensions; CPI data (Wednesday) and Retail Sales (Thursday) will be central triggers for directional conviction across equities, commodities, and crypto. Bitcoin holds structural support from record-low exchange supply and whale accumulation, while gold battles the paradox of safe-haven demand versus inflation-driven rate-cut delays.

signals.name: Silver (XAG/USD)

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Hormuz tensions remain primary driver; best trade setup is long Brent if daily close above $114.44; Brent more exposed to Strait events than WTI.
